catalog.notes: Use SCL and HCL for exact compatibility; ownership and documentation transitioned from Veritas to Cohesity.

catalog.name: NAKIVO Backup & Replication

important_relationships.relates_to: VMware, Hyper-V, Proxmox VE and cloud workloads
important_relationships.why_it_matters: Protected platform support varies by release.
Distributed components and repository platforms must be compatible.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: formal lifecycle duration for each major release was not verified.

catalog.notes: Exact build and protected platform versions should be stored.

catalog.name: PostgreSQL

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Extensions and package builds can constrain major upgrades.
Protocol-compatible clients may still depend on removed behavior or extension APIs.

lifecycle_source.notes: PostgreSQL publishes support duration by major version.

catalog.notes: Versions listed are supported or recently supported major lines; verify current dates in the versioning page.

catalog.name: MySQL

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Server, connector, and OS support must be checked together.
SQL behavior, authentication, and replication compatibility can change across majors.

lifecycle_source.notes: Oracle publishes MySQL end-of-life notices.

security_sources.title: Oracle Critical Patch Updates and Security Alerts

catalog.notes: Edition and release model, including LTS versus Innovation, should be stored.

catalog.name: MariaDB Server

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Distribution packages may have different patch and support policies.
Compatibility is not identical across all MySQL and MariaDB releases.

lifecycle_source.notes: Corrective release policy is documented here; Needs Verification for exact end-of-maintenance date of each deployed branch.

catalog.notes: Do not infer MySQL compatibility without testing and vendor evidence.

catalog.name: Microsoft SQL Server

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Supported OS combinations and cumulative updates matter.
Client drivers and HA topologies can constrain upgrade order.

official_sources.title: SQL Server Latest Updates and Version History
SQL Server End of Support Overview

lifecycle_source.notes: Microsoft lifecycle pages govern each SQL Server release.

security_sources.title: Microsoft Security Response Center Update Guide

catalog.notes: Track major version, CU, edition, OS, and HA topology.

catalog.name: Oracle Database

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Database certification depends on OS, architecture, and RAC/Grid versions.
Application certification and client compatibility can constrain upgrades.

official_sources.title: Oracle Critical Patch Updates and Security Alerts

lifecycle_source.notes: Oracle Lifetime Support Policy should be checked for the exact database release and support tier.

security_sources.title: Oracle Critical Patch Updates and Security Alerts

catalog.notes: Patch set, RU, platform, RAC/Grid, and application certification should be tracked.

catalog.name: MongoDB

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Server and driver support must be validated together.
Rolling upgrade paths and feature compatibility versions constrain changes.

lifecycle_source.notes: MongoDB publishes lifecycle schedules.

catalog.notes: Track edition, exact patch, featureCompatibilityVersion, and driver versions.

catalog.name: Redis

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Protocol and command behavior can affect applications.
Module ABI and cluster behavior can constrain upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: lifecycle differs between Redis Open Source and Redis Software.

catalog.notes: Distinguish Redis Open Source from Redis Software and cloud services.

catalog.name: Elasticsearch

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Stack component version compatibility constrains upgrades.
Supported JVM and plugin versions can change between releases.

lifecycle_source.notes: Elastic publishes maintenance and support dates.

catalog.notes: Track exact patch, license, plugins, JVM, and connected stack components.

catalog.name: OpenSearch

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Plugin and dashboard versions must match supported release combinations.
Runtime and client compatibility can affect upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: a formal lifecycle duration table was not verified.

catalog.notes: Track exact patch and all installed plugins.

catalog.name: Azure Local

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Deployment prerequisites require supported hardware, networking, and software.
Cloud management dependencies can affect lifecycle and connectivity.

lifecycle_source.notes: Microsoft publishes supported update paths and supported-state requirements.

security_sources.title: Microsoft Security Response Center Update Guide

catalog.notes: Azure Stack HCI branding transitioned to Azure Local; normalize historical names carefully.

catalog.name: AWS Outposts

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Outposts operates as an extension of an AWS Region and needs service connectivity.

important_relationships.relates_to: EC2, EKS and S3 on Outposts
important_relationships.why_it_matters: Available services and instance types depend on the Outpost configuration.

lifecycle_source.notes: AWS publishes general service lifecycle change terminology; hardware/service specifics require account and configuration verification.

catalog.notes: Track Outpost type, Region, capacity, supported services, and local network dependencies.

catalog.name: Google Distributed Cloud

important_relationships.why_it_matters: GDC software releases bundle specific Kubernetes versions.
Third-party storage and infrastructure qualifications can be release-specific.

official_sources.title: GDC Software-only Bare Metal Release Notes

lifecycle_source.notes: Release notes document versions and upgrade requirements; product edition matters.

catalog.notes: Do not combine air-gapped, bare metal, and VMware editions into one version without an edition field.

catalog.name: VMware Cloud Foundation

important_relationships.why_it_matters: VCF is a composed stack with versioned component interoperability.
Validated platform and lifecycle management constrain upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: Verify exact VCF release lifecycle and entitlement in Broadcom support.

catalog.notes: Component bill of materials and exact patch level are essential for upgrade impact analysis.

catalog.name: Nutanix Cloud Platform

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Platform services are tied to AOS and hypervisor compatibility.
Platform and guest support are governed by Nutanix matrices.

lifecycle_source.notes: Verify lifecycle for exact AOS and platform services in the Nutanix portal.

catalog.notes: Store exact AOS, AHV, Prism, hardware platform, and enabled services.

catalog.name: Apache Kafka

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Supported Java versions can constrain Kafka upgrades.
Protocol compatibility and feature changes affect rolling upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: upstream Kafka does not expose a single long-term lifecycle table in the sources verified here.

catalog.notes: Versions listed are major release families; exact supported patch lines should be verified from project releases.

catalog.name: RabbitMQ

important_relationships.why_it_matters: RabbitMQ maintains an explicit Erlang compatibility matrix.
Rolling upgrades and plugin support can constrain changes.

lifecycle_source.notes: RabbitMQ publishes community and extended commercial support status.

catalog.notes: Track Erlang/OTP, plugins, and cluster upgrade path.

catalog.name: NGINX Open Source

important_relationships.why_it_matters: TLS library and package builds affect behavior and security.
Dynamic modules and configuration directives can break on upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: formal lifecycle duration for open source branches was not verified.

catalog.notes: Distribution-packaged NGINX may have a different support lifecycle from upstream.

catalog.name: HAProxy

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Package and TLS library versions affect features and security.
Configuration grammar and integrations can affect upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: The project documents maintained branches on its site; exact branch support should be checked there.

catalog.notes: Open source and Enterprise lifecycles differ; keep them separate in production data.

catalog.name: Keycloak

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Supported Java and database versions constrain deployment upgrades.
Protocol behavior, adapters, themes, and custom providers can change.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: community Keycloak support duration differs from Red Hat build lifecycle.

catalog.notes: Custom providers, themes, database schema, and Java runtime should be tracked.

catalog.name: GitLab

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Self-managed deployments depend on versioned backing services.
Runner and integration versions can constrain upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: GitLab publishes maintenance and security backport policy.

catalog.notes: Edition, deployment method, exact patch, runners, and backing service versions should be watched.

catalog.name: Jenkins

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Jenkins LTS lines can change supported Java versions.
Plugin and agent compatibility is a major upgrade risk.

lifecycle_source.notes: Jenkins documents LTS release line cadence; exact old-line retirement should be inferred cautiously.

catalog.notes: Plugin inventory is essential; controller version alone cannot predict upgrade risk.

catalog.name: Sonatype Nexus Repository

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Runtime and persistence support can constrain upgrades.
Repository format and client behavior can be version sensitive.

lifecycle_source.notes: Release history is published here; Needs Verification for exact support end date of the deployed edition and branch.

catalog.notes: Edition and exact patch version should be tracked.

catalog.name: JFrog Artifactory

important_relationships.why_it_matters: Self-hosted deployments depend on supported persistence backends.
Client and platform integration compatibility can affect upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: JFrog publishes deprecations; verify exact Artifactory release support for the deployed edition.

catalog.notes: Cloud and self-hosted editions have different release models.

catalog.name: iDRAC9 with Lifecycle Controller

important_relationships.why_it_matters: iDRAC firmware branches are tied to supported server generations.
Platform updates can have ordering and dependency requirements.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: branch lifecycle depends on PowerEdge generation and Dell support status.

catalog.notes: Track exact server model, iDRAC branch, BIOS and platform firmware bundle.

catalog.name: HPE iLO 6

important_relationships.why_it_matters: iLO generation and firmware support are tied to server platforms.
Coordinated firmware baselines reduce dependency risk.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: lifecycle should be evaluated with the server generation and support entitlement.

catalog.notes: Track exact server model, iLO firmware, system ROM, and SPP baseline.

catalog.name: Lenovo XClarity Controller 2

important_relationships.why_it_matters: XCC2 firmware is tied to supported server platforms.
Update bundles can coordinate multiple firmware components.

lifecycle_source.notes: Needs Verification: lifecycle should be tied to the exact server model and firmware branch.

catalog.notes: Exact server model and XCC2 firmware build are required.

catalog.name: NVIDIA Data Center GPU Driver

important_relationships.why_it_matters: GPU support varies by driver branch.
Driver, CUDA, OS, and kernel combinations constrain upgrades.

lifecycle_source.notes: NVIDIA publishes branch lifecycle and support information.

catalog.notes: Track branch, exact driver build, CUDA toolkit, GPU model, OS, and kernel.

catalog.name: AMD ROCm

important_relationships.why_it_matters: ROCm support varies by GPU architecture and model.

important_relationships.relates_to: Operating system, kernel and amdgpu driver
important_relationships.why_it_matters: ROCm has explicit OS and driver compatibility requirements.

lifecycle_source.notes: Compatibility matrix documents release support; a separate long-term lifecycle policy Needs Verification.

catalog.notes: Track ROCm, amdgpu, kernel, OS, framework, and GPU model.
